name: miastox
description: MiastoX - Climb to the top Roblox game

scripts.dev:cycle: npm run format && npm run lint
scripts.release: npm run preprocess && npm run format && npm run lint && npm run build:prod
scripts.release:lune: npm run preprocess && npm run format && npm run lint && npm run build:lune:prod
scripts.full:dev: npm run install && npm run dev:cycle && npm run build:dev
scripts.full:prod: npm run install && npm run release
scripts.full:lune:prod: npm run install && npm run release:lune

author: MiastoX Team
